Dashboards.Name: OPEX Overview (Sample)
Dashboards.Description: Sample dashboard with Custom SQL widgets showing OPEX data from parsed_tables. Use as a template for your own dashboards.

config.sql: SELECT COALESCE(o.name, pt.org_id::text) AS LabelX, COUNT(pt.id) AS LabelY FROM data.parsed_tables pt LEFT JOIN core.organizations o ON o.id = pt.org_id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY LabelY DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COALESCE(pt.source_sheet, 'Unknown') AS LabelX, COUNT(*) AS LabelY FROM data.parsed_tables pt GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY LabelY DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT pt.id, pt.file_id, pt.source_sheet, jsonb_array_length(pt.headers) AS column_count, jsonb_array_length(pt.rows) AS row_count, pt.created_at FROM data.parsed_tables pt ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT pt.file_id::text AS LabelX, SUM(jsonb_array_length(pt.rows)) AS LabelY FROM data.parsed_tables pt GROUP BY pt.file_id ORDER BY LabelY DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT TO_CHAR(pt.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LabelX, COUNT(*) AS LabelY FROM data.parsed_tables pt WHERE pt.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

Dashboards.Name: Data Quality Monitor (Sample)
Dashboards.Description: Sample dashboard monitoring data quality — empty tables, column statistics, corrections.

config.sql: SELECT pt.id, pt.file_id, pt.source_sheet, pt.created_at FROM data.parsed_tables pt WHERE jsonb_array_length(pt.rows) = 0 ORDER BY pt.created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT jsonb_array_length(pt.headers)::text AS LabelX, COUNT(*) AS LabelY FROM data.parsed_tables pt GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY LabelX::int

SELECT sc.parsed_table_id, sc.row_index, sc.col_index, sc.original_value, sc.corrected_value, sc.correction_type, sc.corrected_by, sc.corrected_at FROM data.sink_corrections sc ORDER BY sc.corrected_at DESC LIMIT 20

Dashboards.Name: Test.xlsx — Project Budget Overview
Dashboards.Description: Dashboard built from the latest upload of Test.xlsx (UAT). Shows project budgets, costs, and variances from sheet List1.

config.sql: WITH latest AS (SELECT pt.headers, pt.rows FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'Test.xlsx' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT r.value->>0 AS "Id", r.value->>1 AS "Project Name", r.value->>2 AS "Max project cost", r.value->>3 AS "Budget24", r.value->>4 AS "Budget 25", r.value->>5 AS "Budget 26", r.value->>6 AS "Cost24", r.value->>7 AS "Cost25", r.value->>8 AS "Cost26", r.value->>9 AS "TotalCost", r.value->>10 AS "ToalBudget", r.value->>11 AS "DiffCost", r.value->>12 AS "DiffBudget" FROM latest l, jsonb_array_elements(l.rows) AS r(value)

WITH latest AS (SELECT pt.rows FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'Test.xlsx' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT r.value->>1 AS LabelX, CAST(r.value->>9 AS NUMERIC) AS LabelY FROM latest l, jsonb_array_elements(l.rows) AS r(value) ORDER BY LabelY DESC

WITH latest AS (SELECT pt.rows FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'Test.xlsx' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT r.value->>1 AS LabelX, CAST(r.value->>10 AS NUMERIC) AS "Budget", CAST(r.value->>9 AS NUMERIC) AS "Cost" FROM latest l, jsonb_array_elements(l.rows) AS r(value) ORDER BY LabelX

WITH latest AS (SELECT pt.rows FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'Test.xlsx' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT r.value->>1 AS LabelX, CAST(r.value->>2 AS NUMERIC) AS LabelY FROM latest l, jsonb_array_elements(l.rows) AS r(value)

WITH latest AS (SELECT pt.rows FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'Test.xlsx' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1), years AS (SELECT '2024' AS yr, 6 AS idx UNION ALL SELECT '2025', 7 UNION ALL SELECT '2026', 8) SELECT y.yr AS LabelX, SUM(CAST(r.value->>y.idx AS NUMERIC)) AS LabelY FROM latest l, jsonb_array_elements(l.rows) AS r(value), years y GROUP BY y.yr ORDER BY y.yr

Dashboards.Name: DemoPage.pptx — Cost Optimization
Dashboards.Description: Dashboard built from the latest upload of DemoPage.pptx (UAT). Shows cost optimization savings extracted from PPTX pseudo-tables.

config.sql: WITH latest AS (SELECT pt.headers, pt.rows, pt.source_sheet FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'DemoPage.pptx' ORDER BY jsonb_array_length(pt.rows) DESC, f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT r.value->>0 AS "Cost Category", r.value->>1 AS "Saving Initiatives", r.value->>2 AS "Net saving 2024 (M€)", r.value->>3 AS "Additional net saving (M€)" FROM latest l, jsonb_array_elements(l.rows) AS r(value)

WITH latest AS (SELECT pt.rows FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'DemoPage.pptx' ORDER BY jsonb_array_length(pt.rows) DESC, f.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT r.value->>0 AS LabelX, CAST(NULLIF(r.value->>2, 'WIP') AS NUMERIC) AS LabelY FROM latest l, jsonb_array_elements(l.rows) AS r(value) WHERE r.value->>2 IS NOT NULL AND r.value->>2 != 'WIP' AND r.value->>2 != '' ORDER BY LabelY

SELECT pt.source_sheet AS "Sheet", jsonb_array_length(pt.headers) AS "Columns", jsonb_array_length(pt.rows) AS "Rows", pt.created_at AS "Extracted At" FROM data.parsed_tables pt JOIN ingestor.files f ON f.id::text = pt.file_id WHERE f.filename = 'DemoPage.pptx' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
